violations.text: Observed wood being used in the construction of (sink and dipping well splash guards) in the (kitchen) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a durable, nonabsorbent, easily cleanable, and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026

Observed the non-food contact surfaces of the (countertop underneath mini refrig.) have an accumulation of old pest droppings and other debris. PIC clean droppings washed and disinfected the area at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
Observed employee toilet in poor repair. The toilet must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The floor tiles in the (front entrance) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026
The condensate from the ice machine is draining into the sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
